prediction.reasoning: This prediction is generated by a simplified model due to the inherent unpredictability of stock prices and my inability to access real-time market data, news, or advanced financial analysis tools. The point estimate assumes the price will remain around the current level over a short 7-day period, as predicting short-term movements is highly speculative. The confidence intervals are estimated heuristically, based on an assumed average daily volatility for a stock of this profile (approximately 1.5% daily) scaled over 7 days using statistical multipliers for a normal distribution. Actual market movements can deviate significantly from these estimates due to unforeseen events, market sentiment, economic news, or company-specific developments.
